segments.text: yo you hear that whistle bending

in the frame like a white knight but the madness
got a name whistle go in the whole dock shake

full of flames step to the boat better know what

one
and the whole bell ring i came out the real with
the lean and the green ink on my gloves in the
storm in my skin moon look crap when the paddle
will spin hold that whisper don't let him in
been up three nights with smoke in my coat
talking to a shadow that been steering the boat
laughing at the fog like it told me a joke then
the whistle hit hard and the pier just spoke
mind doing backflips knees doing swings rubber
hose arms with the old gold rings piano go crooked
when the villain bell dings whole black river
start putting my strings i ain't crazy i'm classic
with the scratch in the brain vintage little menace with
the permanent stain every thought not teeth every
laugh got pain every footstep echo like a runaway train
who got the smoke we got the smoke who got the dock we run
the boat who lost they mind don't say my name too late now

but the whistle still shine.
